seoTitle: Marrara vs Mataranka — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Marrara and Mataranka. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Marrara and Mataranka.
heading: Marrara vs Mataranka — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Marrara, Northern Territory and Mataranka, Northern Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mataranka has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Marrara (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Marrara or Mataranka safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Marrara has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Mataranka scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Marrara scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Mataranka scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Marrara or Mataranka?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mataranka has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
